title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
quote: 把代码变成知识图谱，感觉以后改bug之前得先跟图谱对个话。今天5600个star，程序员对「理解自己写的屎山」的需求果然刚需。
content: Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI.

title: colbymchenry/codegraph
quote: 又一个代码知识图谱。前脚Understand-Anything刚火，后脚Codegraph就杀出来抢地盘。卷，都可以卷。
content: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local.

title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
quote: 从零学AI工程化，1.8万star说明全世界都在补课。问题是学完发现AI又进化了，这课怕是永远毕不了业。
content: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others. AI engineering curriculum from ground zero.

title: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
quote: Anthropic亲手教你怎么让Claude干活，白领们终于不用自己写报告了——虽然审报告比写报告还累。
content: Open source repository of plugins for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork.

title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
quote: 754个安全技能给AI代理，MITRE ATT&CK全覆盖。好消息是AI能帮你防御，坏消息是黑客也在用同一套技能攻击你。
content: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF.

title: moeru-ai/airi
quote: 39k star的赛博老婆容器，自称要追上Neuro-sama的高度。二次元+AI这条赛道，赛道尽头的风景是孤独。
content: Self-hosted Grok Companion — a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings. Real-time voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio. Web/macOS/Windows.

title: hardikpandya/stop-slop
quote: 去AI味的文章润色器。终于有人受够了「It's worth noting」和「delve into」，AI写的东西一股塑料味确实该治。
content: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose — kills the 'delve into', 'it's worth noting', and other AI-isms.

title: garrytan/gstack
quote: YC CEO Garry Tan公开自己的Claude Code配置，23个工具覆盖全职能。硅谷大佬亲自教你用AI替代整个团队，打工人的噩梦。
content: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA.

title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
quote: 文档管理系统又上Trending了。数字化办公的终极理想——把纸扫进电脑然后永远不再看。
content: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents.

title: DeepSeek Reasonix — DeepSeek's native coding agent with high caching and low cost
quote: DeepSeek出官方编码代理了。高缓存低成本，摆明了要跟Cursor和Claude Code抢饭碗。中国AI这是真不讲武德。
content: DeepSeek's specialized coding agent featuring high caching efficiency, low inference cost, and native integration with development workflows.

title: Microsoft open-sources the earliest DOS source code discovered to date
quote: 微软开源最早的DOS源码。看完感觉现在所有复杂软件都是屎山，人家几KB就能启动一个操作系统。
content: Microsoft releases the earliest discovered DOS source code as open source, a historic artifact from the company's founding era.

title: Search engine alternatives now that Google isn't really Google anymore
quote: Google自己都不用Google搜索了，推荐6个替代品。搜索引擎战国时代重启，这次赢家大概还是没人用的那个。
content: TechCrunch reviews six alternative search engines as Google shifts toward AI-generated answers and moves away from its classic search model.

title: Audiomass — free, open-source multitrack audio editor for the web
quote: 浏览器里的开源多轨音频编辑器。Audacity终于有竞品了，而且不用下载那300MB的安装包。
content: Show HN: A free open-source web-based multitrack audio editor that runs entirely in the browser.

title: Migrating from Go to Rust
quote: Go迁移到Rust指南388条评论。评论区大概是Go粉和Rust粉互撕的盛况，建议单独当番剧追。
content: A comprehensive migration guide for teams moving codebases from Go to Rust, covering patterns, pitfalls, and best practices.

title: Jira Is Turing-Complete
quote: Jira是图灵完备的！理论上你可以在Jira里写一个操作系统——虽然没人想，但知道能这么做更让人绝望。
content: A demonstration that Jira's workflow engine is technically Turing-complete, meaning you can theoretically compute anything with Jira tickets.

title: I spent 50 hours drawing a line graph
quote: 花50小时画一个折线图，616人点赞。这大概是程序员版的「匠人精神」——老板看到估计当场裂开。
content: A developer's deep dive into the art and craft of data visualization, spending 50 hours perfecting a single line graph.

title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
quote: 荷兰查封800台攻击服务器。800台！这规模已经不是黑客了，这是开了个DDoS连锁超市。
content: Dutch authorities raid an infrastructure provider, seizing 800 servers allegedly used to facilitate large-scale cyberattacks.

title: Uber COO says it's getting harder to justify the money spent on AI 'tokenmaxxing'
quote: Uber COO说AI烧Token的钱越来越难解释了。大厂终于开始算ROI了，AI泡沫的第一声裂响？
content: Uber's COO Andrew MacDonald questions the ROI of massive AI token spending, signaling a potential industry shift toward cost accountability.

title: text-to-sql
quote: 自然语言转SQL，v6.0了还在更新。产品经理终于可以自己查数据了——DBA们要失业的节奏。
content: When user describes what data they want in natural language, automatically generate and execute SQL queries against connected databases. v6.0.0.

title: ai-image-to-code
quote: 截图直接生成前端代码v6.0。前端仔看到了陷入沉思：设计稿变代码，那我的存在意义是……调Padding？
content: Take a UI screenshot or design mockup image and generate production-ready frontend code automatically. v6.0.0.

title: agent-roundtable
quote: 多AI代理圆桌辩论，自动收敛生成结论。让一群AI替你吵架，人类连思考都省了——直接看胜负。
content: Multi-agent roundtable discussion — topic-driven multi-round debate with convergence detection and conclusion generation. v1.2.3.

title: bytedance-ai-image-gen
quote: 字节豆包生图v2.3，免费调用Seedream顶级模型。字节的免费大礼包又来了，先用后杀的老套路。
content: ByteDance AI Image Gen — 调用豆包/Seedream模型生成/编辑图片，火山协作奖励免费使用，智能调度4.5→5.0Lite→4.0。v2.3.0.

title: batchedits
quote: AI自动剪视频、加字幕、去静音。剪辑师的噩梦，短视频UP主的天堂。以后人均百万播放指日可待。
content: Autonomously edit videos, add captions, and remove silences via BatchEdits API. v1.0.3.

title: scrask-bot
quote: 截图发到聊天窗口自动解析日程任务。连手动添加日历都省了，懒人生产力的终极致敬。
content: When user sends a screenshot via any chat surface, parse it for events and tasks using Gemini. v1.0.2.

title: xiaohongshu-viral-notes-generator-v2
quote: 小红书爆款笔记生成器v2.0。AI帮你制造焦虑、种草拔草一条龙，小红书生态闭环全靠机器硬撑。
content: 小红书爆款笔记生成器 | 自动生成小红书爆款笔记，提高笔记曝光和互动率。v2.0.0. xiaohongshu-viral-notes-generator-v2相关内容可查阅原文获取更多信息。
